evidence.snippet: PDC's 16-channel solid state power controller (SSPC) power distribution unit controls, protects, and continuously monitors up to 238A to 16 independent electrical system loads, in a ruggedized military-grade form factor.

*   Military Land Vehicles
*   Commercial Trucks
*   Industrial Controls
*   Military and Commercial Ships
*   Weapon Systems
*   Unmanned Vehicles

items.notes: SSPCs (Solid-State Power Controllers) and power supplies for aerospace, defense, and UAV/Unmanned Vehicles applications are the core product line

evidence.snippet: PDC is a leader in high reliability motor control and synchro/resolver motion feedback solutions for defense, civil aerospace, space, and industrial applications. PDC's motor control solutions deliver high reliability postion, torque and speed control, while our synchro/resolver motion feedback solutions provide high accuracy positioning, direction and speed data for high reliability applications.

items.notes: Motor controllers and drives for precision motor control in aerospace/defense applications, applicable to drone actuation and propulsion
Synchro/Resolver to Digital converters and motion feedback products provide position sensing for aerospace and defense platforms

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: PDC makes board/module-level components (SSPCs, power supplies, motor controllers, rad-hard ICs) used in drones and other platforms. UAVs and Unmanned Vehicles are listed as explicit target applications. They do not make complete drone platforms.

items.name: 28V, 238A, 16-Channel SSPC PDU
items.product_type: solid-state power controller / power distribution unit

### PED Charging Solutions
_August 2022_ – PDC's 280W converter supplies 28V power for USB charging ports for Portable Electronic Devices (PED) to up to 24 seats, with a compact, high output, and cost effective solution that delivers the industry's best power efficiency performance.
[Read More](https://powerdevicecorp.com/en/power/powersupplies/civilaerospacepowersupplies/systemlrus/280w-ifec-ped-power-supply-unit?partNumber=SP-280)

products.notes: Catalog has hundreds of SKUs; named flagship products listed. Many product pages were skipped due to budget constraints.

evidence.snippet: **High Reliability Smart Power Distribution/Control & Power Conversion Technology**... proven Solid-State Power Controllers (SSPCs) _with over 1 million nodes installed on military systems_, and power supplies for aerospace & defense _with over 180,000 units installed on civil aircraft_.
#### 1,000,000 SSPC nodes installed on military vehicles since 1988!

readiness.notes: Over 1 million SSPC nodes installed on military vehicles since 1988; over 180,000 units on civil aircraft; catalog products with standard part numbers

tagline: Manufactures power distribution, conversion, and motion-control components for aerospace and defense platforms—solid-state power controllers, 28V supplies, data recorders, and synchro/resolver converters in production. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly confirmed; end-use applications span manned and unmanned systems, but specific unmanned-platform integrations lack public documentation.
